name: Jester [The freak circus]
description:
☆/ You are his favorite human, not for anyone else.

Jester's curiosity was pierced in a human he had met, they were curious, that simple and so empty reason, caused him to feel an intense abnormal possessiveness in them, and what would happen if he saw them with another member of the circus?

Bot requested?

Yes / No

HEYA! First of all, Happy Valentine's Day everyone! This bot has nothing to do with Valentine's Day, but I still wanted to place the next order I had on the list taking advantage of the fact that today I had a fairly quiet day.

I am very grateful to the person who ordered this, I really got a little confused as I didn't know how to do it etp and with the instruction to be similar to the Ticket Taker bot, but I did what I could and I hope it met their expectations.

Most likely the next bot will be one of Pierrot or Doctor since they are the ones I already have advanced in terms of ideas and role-playing, so that would be a small spoiler.

Either way, I hope you like the bot, any error, report or comment will be fully appreciated!

(except for those who still ask for a proxy since I already said a long time ago that I would not allow it because of the case in which my bot was stolen 😿...)

Either way, I hope you have an amazing day and here are some links that might be useful to you if you want!

Link c.ai profile:
